creator: loise@kde.org
text:
Created attachment 171242
Qt Creator 4.0.1 update against svn HEAD diff

QtCreator 4.0.1 was released together with QBS 1.5.1 on June 8th, so here is an update to our ports for this bugfix release. More info can be found at

https://blog.qt.io/blog/2016/06/08/qt-creator-4-0-1-released/

The attached patches are svn diffs against ports HEAD.
